items.normalized_title: stricter ev battery standards take effect china
items.title: Stricter EV and battery standards take effect in China
items.brief: 新标准直接对电池系统的安全性提出硬性要求，材料是满足标准的关键，研发人员需关注符合新标准的材料方案。

items.normalized_title: norway s ev share reaches 96 5 june
items.title: Norway’s EV share reaches 96.5% in June
items.brief: 该新闻表明电动汽车市场已进入成熟期，但未涉及具体材料技术突破，对材料研发的直接指导意义有限。

items.normalized_title: car cross vehicle kinodynamics adaptation via mobility representation
items.title: CAR: Cross-Vehicle Kinodynamics Adaptation via Mobility Representation
items.brief: 该新闻不涉及材料技术，对材料研发无直接指导意义。

items.normalized_title: orbital data center hype machine is already orbit
items.title: The Orbital Data Center Hype Machine Is Already in Orbit
items.brief: 虽然轨道数据中心距离产业化遥远，但其极端散热需求可能催生新型热管理材料，这些材料未来或可应用于汽车高功率电子散热。

items.normalized_title: multiuav plat llm oriented platform benchmark framework multi uav collaborative task planning
items.title: MultiUAV-Plat: An LLM-Oriented Platform, Benchmark and Framework for Multi-UAV Collaborative Task Planning
items.brief: 该新闻展示了多无人机协同任务规划的技术进展，可能加速无人机在物流、巡检等场景的落地，进而牵引对轻量化、电池、传感材料的需求。

items.normalized_title: new bmw 7 series ramps up dingolfing progressive luxury meets neue klasse technologies wed jul 01 14 00 00 cest 2026 press release most comprehensive model update company history enters series production neue klasse innovations roll out across existing portfolio greater range faster charging bmw i7 high tech craftsmanship deliver maximum customisation exclusivity g70 lci g70 lci locations production plants sedan 7 series dingolfing
items.title: New BMW 7 Series ramps up in Dingolfing: Progressive luxury meets Neue Klasse technologies Wed Jul 01 14:00:00 CEST 2026 Press Release Most comprehensive model update in company history enters series production – Neue Klasse innovations roll out across existing portfolio – Greater range and faster charging for the BMW i7 – High-tech and craftsmanship deliver maximum customisation and exclusivity G70 LCI · G70 · LCI · Locations · Production Plants · Sedan · 7 Series · Dingolfing
items.brief: 该新闻显示宝马加速技术下放，但未涉及新材料或工艺，对材料研发的直接指导意义较弱。

items.normalized_title: labimus simulation benchmark humanoid dexterous manipulation chemical laboratory
items.title: Labimus: A Simulation and Benchmark for Humanoid Dexterous Manipulation in Chemical Laboratory
items.brief: 该新闻展示了机器人灵巧操作在精密场景中的挑战，但未直接牵引汽车材料需求，因此对材料研发人员关注度较低。
